title: Architecture and adventure
description:
A minecraft Modpack about the adventure and creation genre

一个关于冒险和创造类型的minecraft Modpack
body:
![Architecture and adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a370ba91e586a69b2ad8490453351dc40d66111d.png)
简体中文：
《建筑与冒险》是一个结合了建造与冒险的Minecraft游戏
带你进入一个充满创意与挑战的世界
在这个游戏中
玩家可以自由地设计并建造属于自己的宏伟建筑
同时探索广阔而神秘的地图
解开隐藏在世界中的谜题和秘密
无论是独自一人还是与好友合作，你都将体验到无限的可能性和乐趣！
注意事项 1.建议搭配真实物理mod专业版游玩。
2.本modpack不可用于服务器游玩
English:
Architecture and Adventure is a Minecraft game that combines building and adventure
taking you into a world full of creativity and challenge. In this game
players have the freedom to design and build their own magnificent buildings
while exploring vast and mysterious maps to unlock the mysteries and secrets hidden in the world
Whether alone or with friends, you will experience endless possibilities and fun!
Commercial use is prohibited
注意事项 1.It is recommended to play with real physic mod professional version.
2.This modpack is not available for server play
